task: Press the buttons on a row of four power strips to turn them off
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A white power strip with four buttons is on a green table. The buttons are small and rectangular, arranged in a row. The power strip is rigid and has a flat surface. STRATEGY - Reach the power strip, press each button sequentially to turn them off. Failure modes include missing a button or pressing too hard. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the power strip body; Step 2 press each button with a finger-like contact; Step 3 release after each press.**
Goal: all_buttons_pressed(power_strip)
Scene: power_strip
Step 1: reach(power_strip)
  affordance_region: the body of the power strip
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, power_strip, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, power_strip) < 0.03
Step 2: press(button1 -> button1)
  affordance_region: the first button on the power strip
  contact: finger_contact(button1) [completion]
  spatial: above(button1, power_strip, 0.02) [completion]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: finger_contact(button1)
Step 3: press(button2 -> button2)
  affordance_region: the second button on the power strip
  contact: finger_contact(button2) [completion]
  spatial: above(button2, power_strip, 0.02) [completion]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: finger_contact(button2)
Step 4: press(button3 -> button3)
  affordance_region: the third button on the power strip
  contact: finger_contact(button3) [completion]
  spatial: above(button3, power_strip, 0.02) [completion]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: finger_contact(button3)
Step 5: press(button4 -> button4)
  affordance_region: the fourth button on the power_strip
  contact: finger_contact(button4) [completion]
  spatial: above(button4, power_strip, 0.02) [completion]
  direction: press_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: finger_contact(button4)
<END_OF_PLAN>

the first button on the power strip
the second button on the power strip
the third button on the power strip
the fourth button on the power_strip
